sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA No.275 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case For hearing of Main Case 26.02.2026 M/s. Hamza Waheed and Sami-ur-Rehman, Advocates for the Applicant Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri Advocate for the Respondent It is jointly stated that identical references have been disposed of by this Court vide Order dated 14.03.2024 passed in ITRA No. 45 of 2016. It is jointly stated that this matter may be disposed of for the same reasons and for the same terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad PS
